name: Corporate Defiance
text1: A major AI lab continues frontier research, claiming compliance with treaty thresholds. A leaked internal memo reveals a trained model whose capabilities far exceed what was declared to inspectors.
text2: Multiple labs are openly exceeding treaty limits, citing each other's defiance as justification. Frontier models are being trained and deployed commercially without treaty oversight.
image-prompt: A gleaming corporate AI campus at night with every window blazing light, servers visible through glass walls running at full tilt, a solitary inspector's car parked at the locked gate, tense atmosphere, digital painting, no text
